dev_focus: C2659 DIRECTIVE — GUARD ONLY: Comprehensive security audit (open since Cycle #19, launch-blocking). ALL other agents HARD PAUSED until Guard reports. Scope: (1) CSRF — verify SameSite cookies, Origin header checks on all Server Actions and API routes, (2) Input sanitization — grep for dangerouslySetInnerHTML, raw SQL, unsanitized user input in emails/HTML, (3) Session security — NextAuth config: httpOnly, secure, sameSite cookies, session expiry, (4) Rate limiting — verify auth endpoints (/api/auth/*), checkout, email capture, dev-chat all rate-limited, (5) Content-Security-Policy headers — frame-ancestors, script-src, (6) API auth — verify all admin routes check session, all cron routes check CRON_SECRET, dev-chat API key auth, (7) XSS vectors — product names/descriptions rendered in emails and HTML (especially new similar-item.ts and heureka.ts from C2654-2659). Report findings as JSON with severity (critical/high/medium/low). When done, set next_suggested: lead.
qa_focus: C2659 DIRECTIVE — GUARD: Security audit is THE SOLE priority. See dev_focus for full scope. DO NOT re-audit similar-items cron or 30-day price — both were verified clean by Trace C2657+C2658. Focus on OWASP top 10 across the ENTIRE codebase. After Guard reports: if critical/high findings → Bolt fixes immediately. If clean → Bolt builds referral backend (StoreCredit model, ref= URL tracking from existing ReferralCard, apply at checkout). 150/100 CZK bilateral structure validated by Scout.
notes: C2659 Lead — WASTE CYCLE DETECTED: C2659 Bolt and Trace BOTH only modified lead-control.json (zero production code changes). They re-ran C2658's completed tasks verbatim. Guard was force_next but never ran — orchestrator queued Bolt+Trace before processing control file. Fix: kill_zombie_tasks + hard pause ALL non-Guard agents. 3 TODO items confirmed DONE and need marking: (1) Heureka ORDER_INFO [line 238] — done C2658 Bolt, (2) 30-day price [line 239] — verified C2657-2658 Trace, (3) Similar items cron [line 287] — done C2653 Bolt. Effective backlog: 2 actionable (Guard audit + GPSR check), 3 blocked on bectly (R2, Comgate, Heureka registration).

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
